name: Cranberry Apple Chicken Breasts
recipeIngredient: 4 Chicken Breasts, skinless, boneless, pounded 1/2 inch thick
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Combine cranberries, apples and walnuts in a medium glass bowl.
3. Place breasts in a 13x9-inch baking pan.
4. Top each breast with 1/3 cup filling.
5. Bake for 30 minutes, or until chicken is no longer pink inside.
6. Top each breast with 1/4 cup cheese.
7. Bake for an additional 5 minutes, or until cheese has melted.
